decisions.decision: Removed 7 stale test files instead of fixing them
decisions.rationale: They referenced APIs from an earlier design that no longer exist. Newer tests already cover the same functionality.
SQLite default isolation level requires explicit commits. Tests were failing because writes were not persisted.

decisions.decision: Fixed DDL-in-transaction test by pre-creating table outside transaction
decisions.rationale: SQLite DDL triggers implicit commit, breaking the rollback test assumption.

next_action: Commit current changes, then run /gsd-verify-work for Phase 05 (agent-context-experience) to generate its VERIFICATION.md
context_notes: All 5 phases are code-complete. The project has 360 passing tests. Main remaining work is generating VERIFICATION.md files for phases 03-05 and performing 3 manual UAT items. There are also 956 pre-existing ruff lint issues.
